narrative:
North Royalton-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 997 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.1 percentage points.
